news.t: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
Topping Patterns in Real Estate ETFs Suggest Selling

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Real Estate (SRS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Real Estate Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of large US real estate companies, including REITs. SRS was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...

data.title: 3 Inverse REIT ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: 3 inverse REIT ETFs for Q2 2021 are REK, SRS, and DRV.

data.title: Topping Patterns in Real Estate ETFs Suggest Selling
data.text: A double top pattern may usher in selling ahead of a likely rate cut. Consider these tactics to profit from falling REIT prices.
